name: The Golfers Lounge
about: The Golfers Lounge is a multi-location golf simulation venue in South Carolina, offering access to Trackman simulator technology at its West Ashley, Summerville, and Columbia facilities. The venue operates on a membership model, providing 24/7 access to bays for members, with free bay time included in all membership tiers. Members can use a range of simulator features, including Shot Analysis mode with over 30 data points and access to a library of over 400 courses. Pricing varies by location and membership length, with options from month-to-month to 12-month plans, and initiation fees where applicable.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to top-of-the-line Trackman Simulator Technology
Free bay time for members with no hourly booking costs
Access to over 400 courses, including Pebble Beach and Bethpage Black
Shot Analysis mode offering over 30 data points on swing and ball flight

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service
Full bar service available at all locations

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line Trackman Simulator Technology at all locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue provides club rentals for members and guests.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue offers its own full bar and kitchen service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on simulator wait times and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers putt-putt and easier games for those with less golf experience, making it suitable for families.
